title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Actress (Drama) Predictions
text: According to Variety's awards predictions, Jessie Buckley from Hamnet is positioned as the frontrunner in the Best Actress (Drama) category at the 83rd Golden Globes ceremony. Buckley's win would represent a significant moment in her career trajectory. The article notes that a Globes win would formally kick off her march toward Oscar night, suggesting this victory could serve as momentum heading into the Academy Awards season. The analysis identifies two notable challengers: Renate Reinsve (Sentimental Value) positioned as the primary alternative and Jennifer Lawrence (Die My Love) listed as another possibility. Director Chloé Zhao's Hamnet is expected to perform strongly across multiple categories. The predictions reflect what the author describes as an industry consensus, though the piece acknowledges that the Globes may opt to spread the wealth among competing films, suggesting some underlying uncertainty remains in the race. The ceremony takes place January 11, 2026, with voting having closed on January 3.
